revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-150

The power averaged over that carrier frequency cycle which occurs at the maximum of the pulse of power (usually one-half of the maximum instantaneous power).

Reference: I.R.E. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Peak pulse power (carrier frequency)}}
